items.name_cn:
『Celine Celine』
Capsule Collection Launch❤️
CELINE 2022 AVA Shoulder Bag new colors. The Celine shoulder bag that has been popular since last year is back with new colors😍😍 This new color features a Triumph logo embroidered with gold thread on the Monogram base. The entire bag body is full of logos, with a very strong logo presence!
Full metal hardware → exquisite details, considered perfect. The appearance of this shoulder bag really has no flaws!
Size: 24.5-18-7.5, Material: Gold thread
Style No.: 3112
